events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Saint Francis Memorial for client 1028. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: peanut. Sodium ceiling 600 mg/meal, carbs 45–75 g/meal. Prefers Mediterranean; dislikes pork, mushrooms. Cooking ability: stovetop. 7 meals/week, zone Excelsior.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Baked Cod with Herbed Couscous
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 41 g outside 45–75 g range.

events.title: Rejected: Tabbouleh with Grilled Chicken
events.detail: Excluded — carbs: 40 g outside 45–75 g range.

events.title: Matched: Overnight Oats with Berries
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 300/600 mg ✓, carbs 55 g (target 45–75) ✓, no peanut ✓.

events.title: Matched: Winter Melon Soup with Chicken and Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 354/600 mg ✓, carbs 45 g (target 45–75) ✓, no peanut ✓.

events.title: Matched: Hummus and Veggie Wrap
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 451/600 mg ✓, carbs 52 g (target 45–75) ✓, no peanut ✓.

events.title: Pickup scheduled
events.detail: Meals for client 1028 ready for pickup 2026-07-21, window 14:00–16:00 (Excelsior group). Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1028: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
